From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Indian politician

**R. Perumal** is an Indian politician and was a member of the [14th Tamil Nadu Legislative Assembly](/wiki/Fourteenth_Assembly_of_Tamil_Nadu "Fourteenth Assembly of Tamil Nadu") from the [Sriperumbudur constituency](/wiki/Sriperumbudur_(State_Assembly_Constituency) "Sriperumbudur (State Assembly Constituency)"). He represented the [All India Anna Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam](/wiki/All_India_Anna_Dravida_Munnetra_Kazhagam "All India Anna Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam") party.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

The [elections of 2016](/wiki/2016_Tamil_Nadu_Legislative_Assembly_election "2016 Tamil Nadu Legislative Assembly election") resulted in his constituency being won by [K. Palani](/w/index.php?title=K._Palani&action=edit&redlink=1 "K. Palani (page does not exist)").[[2]](#cite_note-2)
